heading: Ascertainment of value of lands offered for exchange; evidence of title
label: 444a Ascertainment of value of lands offered for exchange; evidence of title
text: The value of all patented lands within said monument offered for exchange, and the value of the lands of the United States to be given in exchange therefor, shall be ascertained in such manner as the Secretary of the Interior may direct; and the owners of such privately owned lands within said monument shall, before any exchange is effective, furnish the Secretary of the Interior evidence satisfactory to him of title to the patented lands offered in exchange; and lands conveyed to the United States under shall be and remain a part of the Petrified Forest National Monument.section 444 of this title
notes: Disestablishment of Petrified Forest National MonumentDisestablishment of Petrified Forest National Monument upon establishment of Petrified Forest National Park, see .section 119 of this title
